title: Error extracting JSON string from text file
symptom: The workflow returns an 'undefined error' when trying to extract a JSON string from a text file.
applies_when: Using a text file containing a JSON string
not_this_if: The JSON string is correctly formatted and extracted
root_cause: The error occurs because the expression used to extract the JSON string starts with an equals sign, which causes n8n to treat the output as a plain text string instead of evaluating it as an expression. Additionally, the JSON structure may be incorrectly set as a single object instead of an array.
fix_steps: Remove the '=' sign at the beginning of the expression in the node.
Change the type of the data field to 'Array' in the Edit Fields node.
Save the workflow and re-run it.
agent_instruction: Adjust the expression and data type in the node settings to correctly extract the JSON.
